🔥 The Most Viral Personality Test of 2026

MBTI is old news. SBTI just dropped.

SBTI is a free online entertainment personality test based on 15 dimensions, featuring 31 questions and 27 personality types. Created by Bilibili creator @蛆肉儿串儿, it went mega-viral across Chinese social media and is now the hottest personality quiz among young people.

Take the Free SBTI Test See All 27 Types
27
27 Personality Types
31
31 Test Questions
15
15 Analysis Dimensions
5
5 Core Models

Why Did SBTI Blow Up?

The free SBTI online test went absolutely viral on Chinese social media, becoming THE topic among young people.

🎯

Brutally Honest Roasts

SBTI doesn't sugarcoat your flaws — it hits you where it hurts. Loser, Faker, Deadweight, Clown... these seemingly savage labels had millions of people screaming: 'That's literally me!'

🌐

Peak Internet Culture

Questions and results are packed with internet slang and meme culture that young people live for. OJBK (The Unbothered), WOC! (The Shook One), ZZZZ (The Playing Dead) — every name is a perfect cultural bullseye.

📱

Built-In Social Currency

Everyone who takes the test gets a unique personality result they can instantly share. When you see your friend's hilarious result, you just HAVE to take it yourself — that's how it goes viral.

💡

Perfectly Captures Gen Z Vibes

In a hyper-competitive, high-pressure world, young people crave being understood but fear being labeled. SBTI uses humor to release that tension, turning self-deprecation into a superpower.

The Origin Story of SBTI

SBTI (short for: Shit-Based Type Indicator) was created by Bilibili content creator @蛆肉儿串儿. Known for a unique sense of humor and sharp observations, this creator has a massive following on Bilibili.

SBTI was born from a rethink of traditional personality tests. While MBTI and similar tests are widely known, they're often seen as too generic and overly positive. @蛆肉儿串儿 decided to create a personality test that's more real and more fun — one that doesn't shy away from human weaknesses.

Carefully designed, SBTI features 27 personality types covering everything from leaders to losers, from mama bears to alcoholics. Each type has a unique personality profile that helps you understand yourself and others — with a laugh.

Official Disclaimer: SBTI is purely for entertainment. Don't take it seriously. The results don't define the real you, and they shouldn't be used to judge yourself or others. Keep a sense of humor and just have fun!

SBTI vs MBTI: What's the Difference?

SBTI Personality Test

  • 27 personality types — way more variety
  • 15 dimensions for deeper analysis
  • Humorous, down-to-earth style
  • Questions based on real life and real feelings
  • Honest descriptions that don't dodge weaknesses
  • Freshly created, tuned into today's youth

Traditional MBTI

  • 16 personality types, relatively fixed
  • 4 dimensions: E/I, S/N, T/F, J/P
  • Academic, serious testing style
  • Questions lean toward work scenarios and abstract topics
  • Results tend to be positive and flattering
  • Based on a theory framework from the 1940s

The 5 Core Models of SBTI

SBTI is built on five core models that analyze your personality from different angles

🪞

Self Model

S1 Self-Esteem & Confidence
Evaluates how you perceive and assess yourself.
S2 Self-Clarity
Reflects how well you understand your true thoughts and feelings.
S3 Core Values
Measures your ambition and drive for achievement.
❤️

Emotional Model

E1 Attachment Security
Tests your sense of security in intimate relationships.
E2 Emotional Investment
Reflects how much you invest in romantic relationships.
E3 Boundaries & Dependency
Evaluates your need for independence in relationships.
🌍

Attitude Model

A1 Worldview
Reflects your view of human nature.
A2 Rules & Flexibility
Tests your attitude toward rules and structure.
A3 Sense of Purpose
Measures how much meaning you find in life.
⚡

Action Drive Model

Ac1 Motivation Type
Reflects what drives you to take action.
Ac2 Decision-Making Style
Tests how decisive you are when making choices.
Ac3 Execution Mode
Measures your follow-through and planning ability.
👥

Social Model

So1 Social Initiative
Tests how proactive you are in social situations.
So2 Interpersonal Boundaries
Reflects your sense of boundaries in relationships.
So3 Expression & Authenticity
Measures your self-expression style and genuineness.

27 SBTI Personality Types

SBTI classifies personalities into 27 types, each with unique traits and behavioral patterns

CTRL
The Controller
How’s that? Got you handled, right?
ATM-er
The Giver
You think I’m rich?
Dior-s
The Slacker
Just wait for my underdog comeback.
BOSS
The Leader
Give me the wheel. I’ll drive.
THAN-K
The Grateful One
I thank the heavens! I thank the earth!
OH-NO
The Alarmist
Oh no! How did I get this type?!
GOGO
The Doer
Go go go - let’s move!
SEXY
The Charmer
You were born to be irresistible!
LOVE-R
The Lover
Your love is overflowing; reality feels underfed.
MUM
Mom
Maybe... can I call you mom...?
FAKE
The Pretender
At last, there are no humans left.
OJBK
The Chill One
I say “whatever” and I mean it.
MALO
Monkey
Life is a level, and I’m just a monkey.
JOKE-R
The Clown
Turns out we were all clowns.
WOC!
The Shocker
Holy crap, how am I this type?
THIN-K
The Thinker
Deep in thought for 100s.
SHIT
The Cynic
This world is a complete mess.
ZZZZ
The Sleepyhead
I’m not dead. I’m sleeping.
POOR
The Underdog
I’m poor, but I’m laser-focused.
MONK
The Hermit
I have no worldly desires.
IMSB
The Fool
Seriously? Am I really a fool?
SOLO
The Orphan
I’m crying - how am I an orphan?
FUCK
The Wild One
Damn, what kind of type is this?
DEAD
The Dead One
Am I still alive?
IMFW
The Worthless One
Am I really... worthless?
HHHH
The Giggler
Hahahahahahaha.
DRUNK
The Drunkard
Strong liquor burns the throat; drunkenness is unavoidable.
See All 27 Types →

How to Take the SBTI Test?

1

Go to the SBTI Test Page

Hit the 'Take the SBTI Test' button to enter the test. The SBTI test has 31 questions in randomized order to ensure fairness and accuracy.

2

Answer SBTI Questions Honestly

Each SBTI question has three options. Pick the answer that best matches your real thoughts and behavior. The accuracy of your SBTI results depends on how honest you are. We recommend taking the test in a quiet environment.

3

View Your SBTI Results

After completing all questions, the system will automatically analyze your scores across 15 dimensions and match you with your best-fit personality type. You can view detailed personality insights, dimension scores, and match analysis.

4

Share Your SBTI Results

Get your unique SBTI personality result link and share it with friends. You can also invite friends to take the test and see what types they get.

SBTI FAQ

What's the difference between SBTI and MBTI?
SBTI is funnier, more honest, and more relatable than MBTI. With 27 personality types and 15 analysis dimensions, it's more comprehensive than traditional tests. The questions are designed with internet culture in mind, making them way more relatable.
Why did SBTI go viral?
SBTI went viral thanks to its brutally honest roasts, perfect integration of internet memes, built-in social sharing appeal, and its uncanny ability to nail exactly how today's young people feel.
Who created SBTI?
SBTI was created by Bilibili content creator @蛆肉儿串儿, known for a unique sense of humor and sharp insight. They created this more honest and entertaining personality test.
How long does the SBTI test take?
The SBTI test has 31 questions and takes about 5–8 minutes. Each question flows seamlessly into the next for a smooth experience.
Are SBTI results accurate?
SBTI is an entertainment personality test — results are for fun only. It can help you understand yourself better, but please don't use the results to make life decisions.
How do I share my SBTI results?
After finishing the SBTI test, you can copy your unique result link and share it with friends so they can take the test too.
What is the hidden personality type DRUNK?
DRUNK (The Alcoholic) is SBTI's hidden personality type — it only appears when you trigger specific conditions in a special question. If you have a... special enthusiasm for alcohol, you might just unlock this secret type.
Why did I get HHHH (The Giggler)?
When every personality type in the standard library scores below 60% match, the system assigns you HHHH (The Giggler). This means your brain wiring is so unique that standard categories just don't apply to you.

Ready to Discover the Real You?

Take the SBTI personality test now — unlock your personality code and find out who you really are
